name: If Condition
description: Routes execution and data based on a condition. Triggers exec_out if True, exec_false if False.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    raw_cond = inputs.get('condition', False)
    cond = bool(raw_cond)
    data = inputs.get('data')
    
    self.log_info(f"Evaluating condition: {cond} (Raw: {raw_cond}, Type: {type(raw_cond).__name__})")
    
    # Set data outputs
    await self.set_output('on_true', data if cond else None)
    await self.set_output('on_false', None if cond else data)
    await self.set_output('result', cond)

    # Trigger appropriate execution branch
    if cond:
        self.log_info("Triggering TRUE branch (exec_out)")
        await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    else:
        self.log_info("Triggering FALSE branch (exec_false)")
        await self.set_output('exec_false', True)
    
    return {
        'on_true': data if cond else None,
        'on_false': None if cond else data,
        'result': cond,
        'exec_out': cond,
        'exec_false': not cond
    }
